name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-5
title: Add e2e test that the assembled prompt references only existing scripts/skills
description: There is no test that verifies the dispatched prompt's references — bug-status.py, backlog-item-status.py, item-status.py, superpowers:code-reviewer skill, superpowers:writing-plans skill, skill-creator:skill-creator skill, policy-block.py — actually exist on disk or in the active skills registry. Such a test would catch BUG-15 (bug-status.py), BUG-22 (code-reviewer skill), and similar drift early. Add e2e test that parses the prompt for *.py paths and Skill('...') invocations and asserts each resolves.

history.note: superseded by CONTRACT-BACKLOG-1 (collapses into versioned schema-based subagent prompt contract; per cluster analysis 2026-05-18, this concern becomes trivial or free once the prompt is a structured contract with inspect/edit surface)
